class.name: GDKPresenceRecord
class.brief_description: Cached Xbox presence record for a user.
class.description: Contains the online state and title presence records for an Xbox user. Retrieved from [code]GDK.presence.get_cached_presence()[/code] or [code]GDK.presence.get_presence_async()[/code].

method.name: get_xuid
method.description: Returns the Xbox User ID for this presence record.

method.name: get_user_state
method.description: Returns the user's online state as a [enum UserState] value.

method.name: get_user_state_name
method.description: Returns the user's online state as a human-readable string.

method.name: is_online
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the user is currently online.

method.name: get_title_records
method.description: Returns an array of title presence records for the user.

members.member: The Xbox User ID for this presence record.
The title presence records for the user.
